---
name: Thesis Question
about: Challenge or refine a core argument in the whitepaper
title: "[Thesis] "
labels: [thesis]
assignees: []
---

## Target Section

Link the exact file and heading or quote the exact sentence.

## Question Or Challenge

What do you think is unclear, wrong, incomplete, or overstated?

## Why It Matters

Explain why this changes the thesis or product direction.

## Proposed Improvement

If you have one, suggest a tighter framing.

## Evidence Or Example

Add a real workflow, system, paper, or reference if possible.
